zh.Boroughbridge, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾波洛賀布利其
zh.Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United King: 英國威爾斯布洛可爾卡維
zh.lifeSummary: 當Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor於大約1129年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾卡維時，他的父親William FitzGerald25歲，母親Maria de Montgomery6歲。他於1149年與Margaret FitzTancred在威爾士布洛可爾卡維結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1204年在英國戴文布勞頓享年76歲。

zh-hans.Boroughbridge, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾波洛賀布利其
zh-hans.Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United King: 英国威尔斯布洛可爾卡維
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor于大约1129年出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾卡維时，他的父亲William FitzGerald25岁，母亲Maria de Montgomery6岁。他于1149年与Margaret FitzTancred在威尔士布洛可爾卡維结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1204年在英国戴文布勞頓享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Odo
meanings: the Celtic name Aodh has been Anglicised into Hugh, and Latinised variously Hugo, Ædus, Ædanus, Aidus, and Odo.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Carew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: FitzWilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

en.lifeSummary: When Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor was born about 1129, in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, William FitzGerald, was 25 and his mother, Maria de Montgomery, was 6. He married Margaret FitzTancred in 1149, in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1204, in Braunton, Devon, England, at the age of 76.

fr.Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United King: Carew, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor est né environ 1129, à Carew, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, William FitzGerald, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Maria de Montgomery, avait 6 ans. Il a épousé Margaret FitzTancred en 1149, à Carew, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1204, à Braunton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor um 1129 in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William FitzGerald 25 und seine Mutter Maria de Montgomery 6. Er hat 1149 in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales Margaret FitzTancred geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1204 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Braunton, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor è nato il circa 1129 nel Carew, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William FitzGerald, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Maria de Montgomery, aveva 6 anni. Lui sposato Margaret FitzTancred nel 1149, nel Carew, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1204, nel Braunton, Devon, England, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales: ウェールズペンブロケシュアイアカーエウ
ja.lifeSummary: Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsorが約1129年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアカーエウで生まれた時，父William FitzGeraldは25歳，母Maria de Montgomeryは6歳であった。1149年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアカーエウでMargaret FitzTancredと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1204年にイギリスデボンブラウントンで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor(이)가 대략 1129년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 카레에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William FitzGerald(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria de Montgomery(은)는 6세였다. 그는 1149년 웨일스 p브로케실르 카레에서 Margaret FitzTancred(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1204년 영국 데폰 브라운턴에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor nasceu aproximadamente 1129, em Carew, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, William FitzGerald, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Maria de Montgomery, tinha 6 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret FitzTancred em 1149, em Carew, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1204, em Braunton, Devon, Inglaterra, com 76 anos.

ro.Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United King: Carew, Pembrokeshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor родился около 1129 г. в местности карю, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William FitzGerald было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria de Montgomery, 6. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret FitzTancred в 1149 г. в местности карю, пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1204 г. в местности браунтон, девон, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Odo of Carew FitzWilliam De'Windsor nació aproximadamente 1129, en Carew, Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, William FitzGerald, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Maria de Montgomery, tenía 6 años. Se casó con Margaret FitzTancred en 1149, en Carew, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1204, en Braunton, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años.
